product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always wear gloves when handling the stake to prevent injury. Be cautious when inserting or removing the stake to avoid damaging underground utilities. Keep the stake away from extreme temperatures and avoid contact with harsh chemicals. Always ensure the stake is securely anchored to prevent it from becoming dislodged and causing harm.
